org.springframework.data.expression.ValueEvaluationContextProvider

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.expression
Value Expression implementation.
org.springframework.data.mapping.model
Core implementation of the mapping subsystem's model.
org.springframework.data.repository.query
Support classes to work with query methods.

  • Uses of ValueEvaluationContextProvider in org.springframework.data.expression

    Subinterfaces of ValueEvaluationContextProvider in org.springframework.data.expression
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ReactiveValueEvaluationContextProvider
    Reactive extension to ValueEvaluationContext for obtaining a ValueEvaluationContext that participates in the reactive flow.

    CachingValueExpressionEvaluatorFactory
    Factory to create a ValueExpressionEvaluator

  • Uses of ValueEvaluationContextProvider in org.springframework.data.repository.query

    Methods in org.springframework.data.repository.query that return ValueEvaluationContextProvider
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ValueEvaluationContextProvider
    QueryMethodValueEvaluationContextAccessor.create(Parameters<?,?> parameters)
    Creates a new ValueEvaluationContextProvider for the given Parameters.
    ValueEvaluationContextProvider
    ValueExpressionDelegate.createValueContextProvider(Parameters<?,?> parameters)
    Creates a ValueEvaluationContextProvider for query method Parameters for later creation of a ValueEvaluationContext based on the actual method parameter values.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    QueryExpressionEvaluator(ValueEvaluationContextProvider evaluationContextProvider, ValueExpressionQueryRewriter.ParsedQuery detector)
